name: Miro
cooked: Really interesting work. Makes sense to leave the storage question out of scope for the library itself. I am curious what your vision is for the storage layer though. Where do you see these encrypted blobs actually living long term, especially in an inheritance scenario?
topic_title: [Rust] descriptor-encrypt: Encrypt any descriptor such that only authorized spenders can decrypt
topic_html_title: [Rust] descriptor-encrypt: Encrypt any descriptor such that only authorized spenders can decrypt
